TOPIC_RELEVANCE_EVIDENCE: Discusses shift from SEO to AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
Addresses AI's impact on search traffic and content discovery
References MIT research on AI content generation and its effects on web traffic
julia_mccoy_audit.UNIQUE_ANGLE: Frames the AI search evolution as an 'apocalypse' making businesses 'invisible by 2027' and introduces the concept of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) as the successor to traditional SEO.
julia_mccoy_audit.VERDICT_REASONING: Julia demonstrates strong expertise in AI-powered SEO evolution with concrete frameworks like AEO and actionable insights about training AI systems. Her content shows deep understanding of the intersection between AI and content strategy, backed by research citations and forward-looking predictions that are highly relevant to the project scope.

patrick_stox_audit.VERDICT_REASONING: Content focuses on AI impact on search traffic metrics rather than AI-powered content production workflows.
